name: Elzette, Azamina of the White Forest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>き<ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖徒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アザミナ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>リゼット
name_jp_tl: Lezette, Azamina of the White Forest
name_jp_tl_base: Lezette, Saint of the White Forest
desc: You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 "White Forest" or "Azamina" monster from your hand. During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 "Azamina" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material: You can add 1 "Sinful Spoils" card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Elzette, Azamina of the White Forest" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 "White Forest" or "Azamina" monster from your hand. During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 "Azamina" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material: You can add 1 "Sinful Spoils" card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Elzette, Azamina of the White Forest" once per turn.
eff: You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 "White Forest" or "Azamina" monster from your hand. action: Reveals itself in the hand for cost
Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
Activates if used as Synchro Material
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
